race.comment: INCHYRA (9) returned from the lengthy break with a comfortable Maiden win over 1000m at this track. Ready for this trip now and maps to stalk the good tempo. Go close. SHYAMALAN (3) relished the drop in class with a surprise on-pace victory from a wide gate over 1280m at Orange. Confidence is high and likely to be there at the finish again. CIAO BELLA MIA (12) handy mare who can surprise fresh from the inside draw. Motored late from the awkward barrier with a slashing fourth over 1200m here last December. Not that far away in a recent trial over 800m, stays in the mix. KOOL BIRD (7) getting better with age and surprised at the good odds with an effortless 1.4 len win over 1200m at this track. Doesn't get the same favours here and not without top-four claims.
